title: Play against Maia 2
description: Maia is set to play at approximately 2000 Elo.

title: Free Move
description: You can make any moves manually

title: Delayed Promotion
moves: 1. c6 Ke7 2. c7 Ke6 3. c8=Q# {Promotion test}

title: Extremely Fast Promotion
moves: 1. c6 Ke7 2. c7 Ke6 3. c8=Q# {Promotion test}

title: Instant Promotion
moves: 1. c6 Ke7 2. c7 Ke6 3. c8=Q# {Promotion test}

title: Castling Test
description: White castles kingside; Black castles queenside.
moves: 1. a3 a6 2. O-O Qe6 3. Qe3 O-O-O 4. Qxe6 fxe6

title: En Passant Test
description: A simple en passant capture test.

title: Takeback Test
description: Plays, takes it back. Plays again.

title: Buggy Vanishing Move (Edge Case)
description: Piece disappears from its origin, then reappears on the destination.

title: Board Reset & Flip Demo
description: Plays endgame moves, removes the board, recreates default start position flipped, and plays first move.

title: Quick Board Flip (Edge Case)
description: Loads a position, waits a short delay, then flips board orientation.

title: Premoves Demo
description: Queues premoves for White and Black and executes them in batches so multiple pieces appear to move together.
